rules.title: New York General Business Law Article 45 - SAFE For Kids Act
rules.scope_note: Applies only within the scope of New York law; not nationwide federal law. Operative dates and Attorney General regulations must be checked before legal use.
rules.source_authority: New York State Senate Open Legislation
rules.status_note: Official New York State Senate Open Legislation bill PDF source for S7694A. Verify current codified law, operative dates, and regulations before legal use.
